name: UBA : User Potentially Phished
notes: Detects 3 or more instances of potential phishing attacks on a single user within an hour.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match at least 3 times with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
conditions_text: when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match at least 3 times with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match at least 3 times with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Potentially Phished on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match at least 3 times with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Potentially Phished
